description: Product description Wisdom Ortho Clean alcohol free mouthwash has been specially formulated for orthodontic wearers to help strengthen teeth and protect gums. The anti-microbial formulation helps to prevent plaque build-up, whilst gum strengthening ingredients help to soothe irritated gums. Use morning and evening after flossing and brushing. Orthodontic patients can often experience greater plaque build-up, leading to common oral health issues such as decay, staining, gum problems, lesions and ulcers. It is essential to maintain a good oral health regime whilst wearing orthodontics to help keep teeth and gums healthy. Directions [Product Specific Instructions] Safety Warning Do not swallow, avoid contact with eyes, and in case of swallowing, seek immediate medical attention. See more
